name: SSHD Connection Denied
description: Detects 10 denied SSHD connections from the same source IP address within 10 seconds. This is a strong indicator of a brute-force attack or other reconnaissance activities against the SSH service, which could lead to unauthorized access, denial of service, or lateral movement.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a high volume of denied SSH connections (10 connections in 10 seconds) from the source IP address **{source_address}** was detected. This is a strong indicator of a **Brute-Force Attack** or a **Denial of Service** attempt (**MITRE ATT&CK T1498**). Immediate investigation is required to block the malicious IP address and to secure the SSH service. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address of the denied connections.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
